description: `set :x to 100` is invalid (spec/grammar.md:104 requires a bare-place after `set`): the colon-place token itself is rejected AND `to` is rejected as an unexpected second token on the line. Error recovery for `to` independently reaches the same failure twice; the parser's end-of-parse() dedup pass (issues #106/#148) collapses the byte-identical second `ol-bad-token` so exactly two distinct-span diagnostics survive.
